category_sources: source_facts.description says solc-select manages multiple Solidity compiler versions; official README at https://github.com/crytic/solc-select describes switching between Solidity compiler versions.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation for solc-select installation, usage, version management, and FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/crytic/solc-select.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Solidity compiler version management; official README documents solc-select and solc wrapper behavior for compiler versions.
